---
title: "Neural Differential Equations and Universal Differential Equations"
subtitle: "SCIML-001 | Track D — Scientific Machine Learning"
description: "The core course of the SciML track: using neural networks inside differential equations to create hybrid mechanistic-data-driven models. Covers neural ODEs, physics-informed neural networks, and the universal differential equation framework."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Neural Differential Equations and Universal Differential Equations

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
